top_tweets.text:
Someone on TikTok predicted human made products and experiences will be perceived as a luxury in future and we are already heading there. 

The moment I see AI in your ad or copy I automatically do not want to buy your product.
top_tweets.author: JayFreaKay
top_tweets.name: Jeffrey K 🍉
top_tweets.summary_zh: 有人預測未來「人類製作」的產品與體驗會成為奢侈品，現在已經出現這個趨勢——當看到廣告或文案用 AI 生成，立刻就不想購買該產品。

top_tweets.text:
Photo gallery icon evolution

Samsung: 👶👦👨🧔👴
Google:     🧎🧑‍🦽🧑‍🦯🚶🏃
Apple:       🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿 https://t.co/2XrqzSYbya
top_tweets.author: TheAppleDesign
top_tweets.name: Apple Design
top_tweets.summary_zh: 用 emoji 比喻三大品牌圖庫 icon 演進：Samsung 與 Google 不斷改版，Apple 則多年來保持一致如石像 🗿。

top_tweets.text:
Proof that graphic designers wont get replaced by AI. You already failed at your job by prioritizing the distracting graphics over providing clear information about the product. 

Its just ugly, crowded and overstimulating.
top_tweets.author: IsThisRealArt_
top_tweets.name: Is This Real Art ?
top_tweets.summary_zh: 諷刺某設計作品過度優先視覺效果而忽略產品資訊清晰度，認為這證明平面設計師不會被 AI 取代——因為 AI 也會犯同樣錯誤。

top_tweets.text:
I don't know why more people aren't buying dead SaaS companies and turning them into AI agent companies.

1. Use OpenClaw, Hermes, Perplexity Computer etc to build an automation that scans Product Hunt, Acquire, and app stores for dead SaaS products. Filter for ones that launched
top_tweets.author: gregisenberg
top_tweets.name: GREG ISENBERG
top_tweets.summary_zh: 建議用自動化工具掃描 Product Hunt、Acquire 等平台，收購死掉的 SaaS 產品並改造成 AI agent 公司。

top_tweets.text:
Using AI "non-technical teams are now shipping production code"

Well, that's not what you want to hear for a financial product.

Coinbase drinking the kool-aid so hard if they think people want to store assets on an exchange that does that.

Let alone one that took pretty poor
top_tweets.author: adamscochran
top_tweets.name: Adam Cochran (adamscochran.eth)
top_tweets.summary_zh: 批評 Coinbase 宣稱「非技術團隊現在能用 AI 直接 ship production code」，認為這對金融產品來說是危險訊號。

top_tweets.text: The truth is that everything starts from the top. What determines your failure or success is your style of leadership and the chain of command that you design.
top_tweets.author: RobertGreene
top_tweets.name: Robert Greene
top_tweets.summary_zh: 一切從領導風格與你設計的指揮鏈開始，這決定了成敗。

top_tweets.text: JUST IN: Coinbase to test AI-native “one-person teams” that combine engineering, design, & product roles.
top_tweets.author: Polymarket
top_tweets.name: Polymarket
top_tweets.summary_zh: Coinbase 將測試 AI 原生的「一人團隊」，結合工程、設計與產品角色。

top_tweets.text:
1/4
🚨 @mobbin  MCP is finally LIVE 📷

Your AI coding tools (Claude, Cursor, etc.) can now tap directly into 600k+ real app screens for perfect UI/UX references. The AI design game just leveled up.

2/4
What changes:
• Ask for “checkout like Stripe” or “onboarding like Linear” https://t.co/nzySYD1Tie
top_tweets.author: MarrComSt
top_tweets.name: Mara Ilie
top_tweets.summary_zh: Mobbin 推出 MCP 整合，讓 Claude、Cursor 等 AI 編碼工具可直接調用 60 萬真實 app 畫面作為 UI/UX 參考，能用自然語言請求「像 Stripe 的結帳流程」。

top_tweets.text:
Today we open early access to @Zapier's next product

We've been using it internally for months (>1,000,000 actions executed so far) and it's completely changed how we work. 

We're letting a small group of AI-forward teams try it first and give feedback. 

Who we’re looking for: https://t.co/PHmDbVZB7j
top_tweets.author: wadefoster
top_tweets.name: Wade Foster
top_tweets.summary_zh: Zapier 開放下一個產品的早期測試，內部已執行超過百萬次 action 並改變工作方式，正尋找 AI-forward 團隊試用並給予回饋。

top_tweets.text:
On 5 May 2025, Skype was officially retired.

Skype GUI in 2003 https://t.co/jdB8RJJqc4
top_tweets.author: WebDesignMuseum
top_tweets.name: Web Design Museum
top_tweets.summary_zh: Skype 於 2025 年 5 月 5 日正式退役，附上 2003 年初版 GUI 截圖作為紀念。

top_tweets.text:
I’ve been testing GPT Image 2 for character reference sheets.

What surprised me most is that it can build a complete design sheet from a simple text prompt: multiple angles, outfit details, handwritten notes, color palette, and a clean layout.

Prompt : https://t.co/DQc5wfQAkz https://t.co/7ftVKJ7mVS
top_tweets.author: underwoodxie96
top_tweets.name: underwood
top_tweets.summary_zh: GPT Image 2 可從簡單文字提示生成完整角色設定表，包含多角度、服裝細節、手寫註記、色板與乾淨排版。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Openclick
top_products.author: Riccardo Arvizzigno
top_products.tagline: macOS agent that turns prompts into automated clicks
top_products.summary_zh: macOS 自動化工具，可將文字指令轉換為系統操作與點擊動作，適合需要自動化工作流程的使用者。

top_products.title: Facts
top_products.author: Ivan Charapanau
top_products.summary_zh: 協助團隊撰寫清晰、具體的產品規格文件，減少模糊不清的描述，適合產品經理與開發團隊使用。

top_products.title: PanicMode
top_products.author: Justin Seyvecou
top_products.tagline: Protect your screen in public with one shortcut
top_products.summary_zh: 透過單一快捷鍵快速隱藏或切換螢幕內容，保護在公共場合使用電腦時的隱私安全。

top_products.title: Dina
top_products.author: Zaid
top_products.tagline: From screen to polished video in minutes
top_products.summary_zh: 將螢幕錄製內容快速轉換為精緻影片的工具，適合需要製作教學或展示影片的使用者。

top_products.title: Agentic API Grader by SaaStr.ai
top_products.author: GJ
top_products.tagline: Your #1 new customer is an AI agent. Are they getting an A?
top_products.summary_zh: 評估 API 對 AI Agent 的友善程度，協助 SaaS 產品優化 API 設計以提升 AI 客戶的整合體驗。

top_products.title: Tollecode
top_products.author: Bernard Ossei-Agyei
top_products.tagline: A local AI coding assistant to delegate tasks to AI agents
top_products.summary_zh: 本地運行的 AI 程式開發助手，讓開發者可將編碼任務委派給 AI Agent 執行。
